title: Parallax whole-feature sweep receipt (v0.38 D2)
description: Structured proof that scripts/feature-sweep.py actually EXECUTED against the integrated tree, written by the sweep itself (--receipt) at .parallax/<slug>/sweep-receipt.json and committed with the terminal bundle. Closes the RUN1 gap where the terminal event asserted 'feature-sweep clean' as prose with empty artifact_paths and nothing on disk: scripts/finalize-gate.py now refuses completion unless a committed receipt validates here, its verdict is clean, and its manifest_sha256 matches the committed invariants.json bytes (the sweep provably ran against THE manifest, not a different one).

manifest_sha256.description: sha256 of the invariants.json bytes the sweep ran against — finalize-gate re-derives this from the committed manifest and requires the match.
